app.name: Transition Companion
app.tagline: Your checklist. Your pace. Your choices.

landing.resume: Pick up where you left off
landing.description: A personal tool for navigating gender transition — legal, medical, social, and personal. Your personal information stays on your device. Anything you share to help others is always your choice.

onboarding.your_progress_is_saved: Your progress is saved as you go. You can close this and come back anytime.

welcome.title: This is your tool.
welcome.body: You decide what goes in it, what you share, and what you do with it. Nothing leaves your device.
welcome.subtitle: No account. No cloud. No assumptions.

about_you.title: A little about you
about_you.subtitle: All of this is optional. You can change anything later.
about_you.name_label: What would you like to be called in this app?
about_you.name_placeholder: Your name or whatever feels right
about_you.here_for_note: Check any that apply. You can check all of them or none.
about_you.gender_marker_target_label: If changing your gender marker, what marker are you updating to?
about_you.gender_marker_target_placeholder: M, F, X, or whatever applies

location.title: Where are you?
location.subtitle: This helps us show you the right steps and flag anything specific to your area.
location.no_kb_data: We do not have specific information for your area yet. We will still help you find the right direction for each item, and you can add what you discover.
location.birth_hint: Birth certificates and some other records are usually issued where you were born — not where you live now.
location.others_heading: Anywhere else with documents that may matter?
location.others_hint: Prior residences, immigration history, anywhere you still hold records that may need updating.

documents.title: Documents you already have
documents.subtitle: Tell us where each of these stands today. Skip anything you would rather come back to later.
documents.skip_hint: These details help us show you the right next step on each item. Nothing here is required.
documents.no_applicable_items: Based on where you are, we don't have specific documents to ask about right now. You can capture document state on each item later if it is useful.

safety.title: Safety and access
safety.subtitle: This helps understand what is actually available to you right now. It also helps flag things that might need more care in your situation. Everything here stays on your device.

housing_options.independent: Independent (alone or with a supportive household)
housing_options.family_or_others: Living with family or others who may not be supportive

privacy_options.private: Private accounts and devices that only I access

flexibility_options.a_lot: A lot — I can move freely on most of this
flexibility_options.some: Some — there are areas where I need to be careful
flexibility_options.not_much: Not much — I need to be thoughtful about nearly everything
flexibility_options.varies: It varies a lot by area

transportation_options.ride_share: Ride share / depends on someone else

safety.footer_note: You can update any of this anytime. The app will never hide items from you based on your answers here — it will flag what needs extra care.

presence.title: How do you want this app to show up for you?
presence.subtitle: Different people need different things from a tool like this. There is no right answer.
presence.level_label: What would be most helpful overall?

just_the_path.label: Just the path
just_the_path.description: Show me the checklist and stay out of the way. I will ask if I need more.

some_guidance.label: Some guidance
some_guidance.description: I would appreciate context and occasional suggestions along the way.

walk_with_me.label: Walk with me
walk_with_me.description: I am still working things out. I would welcome more support and gentle prompts toward things I might not think to look for.

presence.level_note: None of these is more advanced or more valid than the others.
presence.open_doors_label: Would you like the app to occasionally surface things you might not know to look for — community groups, resources others have found helpful, ways to explore before making anything official?
presence.per_track_note: You can set this differently for each track. For now your overall setting applies everywhere, and you can adjust per-track from the dashboard at any time.

direction.title: What are you heading toward?
direction.subtitle: A loose sense of where things sit for you. You can change any of this at any time.
direction.hint: For each one, pick what feels true today. Leave any blank that does not apply or that you do not want to think about right now.
direction.footer: These choices help us shape what your dashboard shows you first. Nothing here is a commitment.

legal_name_change.label: Legal name change
legal_name_change.description: Changing the name on official records — full change, partial, or a specific document.

gender_marker_change.label: Gender marker on documents
gender_marker_change.description: Updating the marker on IDs and other records, where possible.

birth_certificate_update.label: Birth certificate update
birth_certificate_update.description: Amending or reissuing your birth certificate.

medical_transition.label: Medical transition
medical_transition.description: Finding care, starting hormones, surgical consultations, or whatever path fits you.

social_name_use.label: Using your name socially
social_name_use.description: Choosing where and with whom your name is used — distinct from legal change.

finding_a_name.label: Finding the right name
finding_a_name.description: Still working out what to call yourself. That is its own kind of work.

accounts_and_services.label: Updating accounts and services
accounts_and_services.description: Banks, employers, subscriptions, anywhere your name or marker is stored.

workplace_update.label: Workplace name or presentation
workplace_update.description: Changes at work — name, pronouns, how you show up.

bulk_intent.title: Build your list
bulk_intent.subtitle: Mark items by what you want to do with them. Anything you leave alone stays off your list.
bulk_intent.hint: You can mark a whole section at once or pick item by item. Search to find something specific.
bulk_intent.no_kb_yet: We do not have suggested items loaded for these tracks yet. You can still add your own here, or add things later from the dashboard.
bulk_intent.relationship_note: Whether, when, and how to come out to anyone is entirely your choice. Nothing in this section is a suggestion.
bulk_intent.mark_all_as: Mark all in this section as: {{intent}}
bulk_intent.custom_placeholder: What do you want to call it?
bulk_intent.skeletons_note: We added these as starting points based on what you said earlier. They are placeholders you can fill in — anything you learn here helps the next person too.
bulk_intent.skeleton_description: Placeholder. Fill in the steps that apply to your jurisdiction. You can contribute what you learn back to the knowledge base later.

contributor.title: One more thing
contributor.subtitle: This app gets better as more people use it and share what they learn. You decide how much you want to be part of that.
contributor.privacy_label: When you complete an item, share a note about how it went?

privacy_options.manual: Only if I choose to, one at a time
privacy_options.never_include: No, keep my notes private always

contributor.involvement_label: How involved do you want to be?

involvement_options.reporter: I would flag outdated info if I found it
involvement_options.contributor: I might submit updates or corrections

summary.title: You are set.
summary.subtitle: Here is what you have added so far. You can change anything from the dashboard.
summary.your_list_empty: Nothing on your list yet. That is fine — you can add things from the dashboard at any time.
summary.available_now_subtitle: Items you can act on right away based on what you have told us.
summary.available_now_empty: Nothing is showing as available right away. That does not mean nothing is — it means we do not have enough information yet to be sure. Anything on your list will still be there.
summary.danger_flags_subtitle: Based on where you are and what you are working on, these need extra care right now.
summary.danger_flags_status_unavailable: Currently not available in your area
summary.see_full_list: See your full checklist on the dashboard.

progress.well_along: You've covered a lot of ground.
progress.all_done: You've done everything on your list.

start_here_reason.critical_foundation: This one unlocks a lot from here.
start_here_reason.unlocks_many: Completing this opens up several more items.

dashboard.active_section_intro: Tasks ready to work on right now.
dashboard.working_on_blockers_intro: These have something in the way, but the path is yours to walk. Open one to see the resolution steps.
dashboard.waiting_section_intro: Outside your control right now — policy, circumstance, or paperwork that has to land first.
dashboard.confirm_resolve_nudge_intro: Linked resolution tasks are done. Open the task to confirm.
dashboard.access_filter: Show only what I can do with my current access
dashboard.quick_add_placeholder: What do you want to add?
dashboard.no_available: Nothing is ready to act on right now. Items will appear here as their dependencies are met.
dashboard.no_items_on_list: Nothing on your list yet. You can add items here or go back through setup.
dashboard.kb_error: Could not load your checklist data. Your saved information is safe. Check your connection and try refreshing.
dashboard.subtask_overdue_hint: One or more sub-tasks on this item are past their due date
dashboard.policy_blocked_intro: These items are blocked by policy right now. They will still be here if the situation changes.
dashboard.revisit_section_intro: You wanted to come back to these. No pressure — they are just here when you are ready.
dashboard.someday_section_intro: Things you want on the list but are not actively working on right now.

item.priority_hint: When you expect to be working on this. Editable any time.

doc_state.heading: Document state
doc_state.intro: What the current document looks like — separate from how far you are with the paperwork to change it.

jurisdiction_override.label: Jurisdiction for this item
jurisdiction_override.hint: Defaults to the right place based on the item type. Change this if a different jurisdiction applies.

revisit.label: Revisit on
revisit.hint: We will surface this quietly on your dashboard on or after this date.

item.notes_placeholder: What you know, what you tried, what helped.
item.report_issue: Something looks wrong with this information

errors.kb_load_failed: Could not load the knowledge base. Your checklist data is safe. Check your connection and try refreshing.
errors.storage_full: Your device storage is full. Your data has not been lost, but new changes may not save. Try clearing your browser cache.
errors.import_invalid: This file does not look like a Transition Companion export. Check that you selected the right file.
errors.import_parse_error: The file could not be read. Check that it is valid JSON.

settings.title: Settings
settings.section_aspirations_intro: What you said you were heading toward when you started. Edit any time.
settings.section_bulk_intent_intro: Add, remove, or change the intent on any item. Use the search box to find something quickly.
settings.import_confirm: This will replace your current checklist with the imported data. Your existing data will be lost unless you export it first.
settings.clear_warning: This will permanently delete your checklist and all your notes. Export your data first if you want to keep it.
settings.people_map_link: Manage the people in your life

item_detail.not_found: This item is not in the knowledge base.
item_detail.not_found_note: Your checklist data is safe. The item may have been renamed or removed.
item_detail.kb_error: The knowledge base could not be loaded. Your checklist data is safe.
item_detail.internet_optional: Internet access helps but is not required
item_detail.phone_required: A phone is needed for this
item_detail.immutable_why: Some documents record a historical event. They are not updated — not due to policy failure, but by design.
item_detail.gmc_danger_heading: Gender marker changes here are currently a risk area
item_detail.gmc_unavailable_heading: Gender marker changes are not currently available here
item_detail.gmc_varies_heading: This varies significantly by jurisdiction or situation
item_detail.gmc_unknown_heading: No verified information is available for this area
item_detail.gmc_legal_note: This is not legal advice. A trans legal organization can help you understand your options.
item_detail.at_risk_body: A change outside your control has put this under threat. Your record of completing it is preserved.
item_detail.at_risk_action: If you receive any correspondence about this, a trans legal organization can help you understand your options.
item_detail.revoked_body_with_completion: You recorded that this was reverted on {{revoked_date}}. Your record of completing this in {{completed_month}} is preserved.
item_detail.revoked_body_no_completion: You recorded that this was reverted on {{revoked_date}}.
item_detail.revoked_action: If you want to understand your options or challenge this, a trans legal organization may be able to help.
item_detail.notes_private_note: Your notes stay on this device and are never shared.
item_detail.recovery_heading: You may want to look at
item_detail.recovery_intro: These items sometimes become relevant when this status changes.
item_detail.report: Something looks wrong with this information
item_detail.intent_hint: This only affects whether the item appears on your active list.
item_detail.policy_blocked_note: This item is blocked by policy. It stays here so you can revisit it if things change.
item_detail.custom_item_delete_warning: This will permanently remove the item and all its notes and sub-tasks.
item_detail.custom_item_label_placeholder: What do you want to call it
item_detail.convert_to_recurring_prompt: Want to set a recurring reminder for this?

people_map.title: People
people_map.intro: This is private and optional. It is here if it is useful to you — to keep track of where things stand with people in your life, and who may need to update their records.
people_map.field_label: What to call this person in the app
people_map.field_out_to: Are you out to this person?
people_map.field_out_status: How it went, or what they know
people_map.field_contact_frequency: How often you are in contact
people_map.field_items_to_update_hint: Records, accounts, or information this person holds that will need to change.
people_map.things_to_update_intro: People in your list who have records or information that will need to change.
people_map.things_to_update_empty: No one has any pending items.

contribute.title: Contribute
contribute.intro: Found something outdated or wrong? You can flag it here. Your personal notes are never included — only the process information.
contribute.no_item: Not tied to a specific item
contribute.field_correct_placeholder: If you know the right answer
contribute.field_wrong_required: Describe what needs to change before submitting.
contribute.privacy_note: Only information about the process is shared, not your personal notes or checklist.
contribute.pr_label: Copy JSON for a pull request

recurring.title: Recurring items
recurring.intro: Things you do regularly — appointments, check-ins, renewals. These surface on your dashboard when they are coming up or overdue.

mode.manual: I set the date each time

mode_hint.fixed: You set an interval (e.g. every 90 days). The next date computes automatically when you log it.
mode_hint.manual: You pick the next date each time. Useful when the timing varies or depends on appointments.
mode_hint.open: A standing intention with no specific due date. It stays visible in a soft section on your dashboard.

recurring.form_label_placeholder: What do you want to track
recurring.form_start_date_hint: For fixed-interval items, sets the first due date before you have logged any completions.

blockers.heading: What is in the way
blockers.intro: Anything blocking this — bureaucratic, legal, financial, personal, or otherwise. Whatever you say is the reason is the reason.
blockers.empty_collapsed: No blockers noted. Expand to add one.
blockers.empty_expanded: Nothing in the way right now. Add a blocker if something comes up.
blockers.remove_confirm_bad_data: Remove this blocker because it shouldn't be here?
blockers.remove_confirm_situation_changed: If the situation changed, marking the blocker resolved or dismissed keeps the history. Remove only if this blocker shouldn't exist at all.
blockers.field_description_placeholder: Describe it in your own words
blockers.field_resolution_mode: What kind of blocker is this
blockers.resolution_mode_resolvable: Something I can do something about
blockers.resolution_mode_resolvable_hint: Even if it'll take a while, there are steps that could resolve it.
blockers.resolution_mode_out_of_control_hint: A policy, a circumstance, or a situation that has to shift before I can act.
blockers.out_of_control_policy_hint: Tracked by the knowledge base. The app surfaces a prompt when the policy changes.
blockers.out_of_control_personal_circumstance_hin: Only you know when it shifts. Nobody is going to chase this for you.
blockers.field_kb_condition_none: Not tied to a specific tracked policy
blockers.field_suppress_workaround: Don't surface workarounds for this blocker
blockers.field_suppress_workaround_hint: Some blockers shouldn't have an alternative offered. The note stays in your data either way.

type_hint.legal: A law, policy, or active legal situation is in the way.
type_hint.access: A practical access barrier — internet, transportation, cost.
type_hint.safety: Proceeding could put your safety or stability at risk.
type_hint.relationship: A specific person or relationship is a factor.
type_hint.readiness: You are not ready yet. That is reason enough.
type_hint.waiting: Blocked on an external timeline you don't control.

blockers.resolution_tasks_empty: No resolution tasks yet. Add one below or convert this blocker into a task.
blockers.convert_to_task: Convert this blocker into a task
blockers.convert_to_task_intro: Spawns a custom item linked back to this blocker. Track it like any other task.
blockers.confirm_resolve_heading: These can resolve this blocker now
blockers.confirm_resolve_intro: The linked task is done. Mark the blocker resolved when you're ready — having the key doesn't always mean the door is open yet.
blockers.policy_changed_heading: This policy has changed since you marked it blocked
blockers.personal_circumstance_note: Personal circumstance — only you know when this shifts.
blockers.graph_unmet_intro: These items need to be complete first. Work on them, or note other blockers in the way.
